status: Fixed in current working tree; validating for commit
area: ATM runtime residue reconciler / abandoned or foreign governance artifacts
finding: Governed workflows can leave untracked `.atm/history/**`, `.atm/task-plans/**`, `.atm/runtime/**`, and handoff artifacts from abandoned, released, or foreign tasks. Later agents cannot safely delete, stage, or commit these files because they may be audit evidence from another task, but leaving them in the worktree makes every closeout noisy and can block generated-residue guards.
expectedBehavior: Every ATM governance action should own its environment cleanup contract: normal completion should either commit/archive its durable evidence or remove disposable runtime files; only forced pauses, active foreign ownership, or explicit human-decision states may leave residue. ATM should provide a first-class residue reconciler that classifies `.atm` artifacts by task id, ledger state, actor/claim ownership, provenance, and disposability, then offers safe actions: attach to owning task, archive as governed evidence, discard only disposable runtime residue, or defer with a clear owner/queue.
evidenceOrRepro: Reproduced during the same TASK-GIT-0015 closeout: after the task itself was done/no-residue, `git status --short` still listed untracked `.atm/history/evidence/TASK-AAO-0165.json`, `.atm/history/task-events/TASK-AAO-0165/`, `.atm/history/tasks/TASK-AAO-0171.json`, `.atm/task-plans/TASK-AAO-0189.md`, `.atm/runtime/broker-conflict-resolutions/`, `.atm/runtime/git-push-attempts/`, and related artifacts from older or foreign tasks. Similar residue was previously recorded in rows 147 and 161. On 2026-07-13, `atm residue status --json` correctly separated active-owner TASK-AAO-FABLE-009 artifacts from abandoned/handoff/runtime residue, but it was still read-only; the operator had to remove the non-active residue with a manually curated path list and then rerun status to reach zero residue. The repair adds `residue reconcile`, dry-run by default, plus `--apply` for owner-aware deletion of non-staged disposable residue such as abandoned-task artifacts, runtime push-attempt/broker artifacts, and released broker-intents while deferring active-owner or staged entries. Focused regression: `node --strip-types packages/cli/src/commands/__tests__/residue.spec.ts`; source/frozen smoke: `node atm.dev.mjs residue reconcile --json`, `node atm.mjs residue reconcile --json`, and `node atm.mjs residue reconcile --apply --json` cleaned current safe runtime residue.
followUp: Commit the reconciler repair and frozen runner sync, then extend follow-up coverage for incident-specific resolution and release mirror cleanup under rows 102 and 171 rather than treating those as generic disposable residue.
